metadata.description: Batch 47 - additional Oxford 5000 words 1601-1700; source-aligned from attached PDF

words.definitionEn: choosing only particular items
words.definitionTh: เลือกเฉพาะ
words.example: Use selective filtering to remove invalid records.

words.definitionEn: an educational meeting for discussion
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “seminar”.

words.definitionEn: a physical feeling or strong public excitement
words.definitionTh: ความรู้สึก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sensation”.

words.definitionEn: the ability to detect small changes
words.example: Adjust the sensor sensitivity carefully.

words.definitionEn: a general feeling or opinion
words.definitionTh: ความรู้สึกหรือทัศนคติ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sentiment”.

words.definitionEn: the act of moving things or people apart
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “separation”.

words.definitionEn: forming a numbered or connected series
words.definitionTh: เป็นชุดต่อเนื่อง
words.example: Record the device serial number.

words.definitionEn: an agreement or a place where people establish homes
words.definitionTh: การตั้งถิ่นฐาน / ข้อตกลง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “settlement”.

words.definitionEn: a person who establishes a home in a new area
words.definitionTh: ผู้ตั้งถิ่นฐาน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “settler”.

words.definitionEn: the arrangement and preparation of a system
words.definitionTh: การตั้งค่า
words.example: Verify the camera setup before production.

words.definitionEn: to a very serious degree
words.definitionTh: อย่างรุนแรง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “severely”.

words.definitionEn: sexual identity, attraction, and related qualities
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sexuality”.

words.definitionEn: sexually attractive
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sexy”.

words.definitionEn: having a particular form
words.example: The bracket is shaped to fit the frame.

words.definitionEn: an owner of shares in a company
words.definitionTh: ผู้ถือหุ้น
words.example: The report explains value to each shareholder.

words.definitionEn: to break suddenly into many pieces
words.definitionTh: แตกละเอียด
words.example: Impact may shatter the protective glass.

words.definitionEn: to release or remove; a simple storage building
words.definitionTh: หลั่ง / โรงเก็บ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “shed”.

words.definitionEn: complete and nothing except; very steep
words.definitionTh: แท้จริง / สูงชัน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sheer”.

words.definitionEn: the transport of goods
words.example: Protect the camera during shipping.

words.definitionEn: causing great surprise or concern
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “shocking”.

words.definitionEn: a photographic session or act of firing
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “shoot”.

words.definitionEn: land along the edge of water
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “shore”.

words.definitionEn: a situation where there is not enough
words.definitionTh: การขาดแคลน
words.example: A spare-part shortage delayed the repair.

words.definitionEn: after a short time
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “shortly”.

words.definitionEn: lasting for a limited period
words.example: Use a short-term control until installation.

words.definitionEn: to become smaller in size
words.example: The material may shrink at low temperature.

words.definitionEn: to raise the shoulders to show uncertainty
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “shrug”.

words.definitionEn: a brother or sister
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sibling”.

words.definitionEn: a paved path beside a road
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sidewalk”.

words.definitionEn: to breathe out audibly
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sigh”.

words.definitionEn: a person’s written name or distinctive feature
words.example: Add the approver’s digital signature.

words.definitionEn: importance or meaning
words.example: Explain the statistical significance.

words.definitionEn: to imitate a real process or condition
words.example: Simulate the fault before deployment.

words.definitionEn: a model or imitation of a real process
words.example: The simulation predicts product flow.

words.definitionEn: at the same time
words.example: Both cameras capture images simultaneously.

words.definitionEn: an act considered morally wrong
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sin”.

words.definitionEn: located in a particular place
words.example: The sensor is situated above the conveyor.

words.definitionEn: not easily convinced
words.example: The team remained skeptical until validation.

words.definitionEn: a quick rough drawing or outline
words.example: Create a wiring sketch for review.

words.definitionEn: having training and ability
words.example: Only skilled technicians should adjust the lens.

words.definitionEn: to omit or move past something
words.example: Do not skip the verification step.

words.definitionEn: the bones forming the head
words.definitionTh: กะโหลกศีรษะ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “skull”.

words.definitionEn: to hit or close with great force
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “slam”.

words.definitionEn: to hit with an open hand
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “slap”.

words.definitionEn: to cut deeply or reduce sharply
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “slash”.

words.definitionEn: the system of owning people as property
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “slavery”.

words.definitionEn: a short memorable phrase
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “slogan”.

words.definitionEn: an available position or narrow opening
words.example: Insert the module into the correct slot.

words.definitionEn: to break violently into pieces
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “smash”.

words.definitionEn: to break or move with a sudden sharp sound
words.definitionTh: ดีด / หักดังเป๊าะ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “snap”.

words.definitionEn: to become very wet in liquid
words.example: Do not soak the electrical enclosure.

words.definitionEn: to rise rapidly to a high level
words.example: Defect rates may soar after a major fault.

words.definitionEn: commonly described by a particular name
words.definitionTh: ที่เรียกกันว่า
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “so-called”.

words.definitionEn: supporting socialist ideas
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “socialist”.

words.definitionEn: only one or belonging to one person
words.definitionTh: เพียงผู้เดียว
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sole”.

words.definitionEn: only and not involving anything else
words.definitionTh: เพียงอย่างเดียว
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “solely”.

words.definitionEn: unity and mutual support within a group
words.definitionTh: ความเป็นหนึ่งเดียว
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “solidarity”.

words.definitionEn: performed by one person
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “solo”.

words.definitionEn: in an unknown way
words.definitionTh: อย่างใดอย่างหนึ่ง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “somehow”.

words.definitionEn: at an unspecified time
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sometime”.

words.definitionEn: advanced, complex, and refined
words.example: The system uses a sophisticated vision model.

words.definitionEn: a student in the second year of college
words.definitionTh: นักศึกษาปีสอง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sophomore”.

words.definitionEn: reliable, sensible, or based on valid evidence
words.definitionTh: มั่นคง / สมเหตุผล
words.example: The proposal is technically sound.

words.definitionEn: the independent authority of a state
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sovereignty”.

words.definitionEn: unwanted electronic messages
words.example: The filter blocks spam messages.

words.definitionEn: to extend across a period or distance
words.definitionTh: ครอบคลุมช่วง
words.example: The project spans three production lines.

words.definitionEn: extra and available; to avoid harming
words.definitionTh: สำรอง / ไว้ชีวิต
words.example: Keep a spare sensor in the cabinet.

words.definitionEn: to cause the beginning of an activity
words.example: A loose wire may spark.

words.definitionEn: to focus on one subject or skill
words.example: The supplier specializes in machine vision.

words.definitionEn: designed for a particular purpose
words.example: Use specialized lighting for the reflective surface.

words.definitionEn: a precise statement of requirements
words.example: Check the camera specification.

words.definitionEn: to state requirements clearly
words.example: Specify the required resolution.

words.definitionEn: an individual sample used for examination
words.definitionTh: ตัวอย่างชิ้นงาน
words.example: Place the specimen under the camera.

words.definitionEn: an impressive public display or event
words.definitionTh: ภาพอันน่าตื่นตา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “spectacle”.

words.definitionEn: very impressive to watch
words.definitionTh: น่าตื่นตาตื่นใจ
words.example: The trial achieved a spectacular improvement.

words.definitionEn: a person who watches an event
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “spectator”.

words.definitionEn: a complete range of related values
words.example: Analyze the light spectrum.

words.definitionEn: to form an opinion without firm evidence
words.example: Do not speculate without evidence.

words.definitionEn: the act of forming an uncertain opinion
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “speculation”.

words.definitionEn: a period under influence; to form a word with letters
words.definitionTh: ช่วงเวลา / สะกด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “spell”.

words.definitionEn: an area of activity or influence
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sphere”.

words.definitionEn: a substance used to flavor food
words.definitionTh: เครื่องเทศ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “spice”.

words.definitionEn: to accidentally let liquid flow out
words.example: Clean any product spill immediately.

words.definitionEn: to turn rapidly around a center
words.example: The shaft can spin at high speed.

words.definitionEn: the central column of bones in the back
words.definitionTh: กระดูกสันหลัง
words.example: The cable tray forms the network spine.

words.definitionEn: a feeling of wanting to hurt or annoy
words.definitionTh: ทั้ง ๆ ที่
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “spite”.

words.definitionEn: to damage or ruin quality
words.example: Heat can spoil the product.

words.definitionEn: a man who speaks officially for a group
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “spokesman”.

words.definitionEn: a person who speaks officially for a group
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “spokesperson”.

words.definitionEn: a woman who speaks officially for a group
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “spokeswoman”.

words.definitionEn: financial or public support for an activity
words.definitionTh: การสนับสนุน
words.example: The project received management sponsorship.

words.definitionEn: public attention or a strong focused light
words.example: The audit put traceability in the spotlight.

words.definitionEn: a husband, wife, or married partner
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “spouse”.

words.definitionEn: a person secretly collecting information
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “spy”.

words.definitionEn: a small organized team
words.example: A technical squad supports deployment.

words.definitionEn: to press firmly from opposite sides
words.example: Do not squeeze the fiber cable.

words.definitionEn: to push a sharp object into something
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “stab”.

words.definitionEn: the quality of remaining steady and reliable
words.example: Monitor model stability over time.

words.definitionEn: to make something steady and less variable
words.definitionTh: ทำให้เสถียร
words.example: The bracket helps stabilize the camera.

words.definitionEn: money or interest at risk in an activity
words.definitionTh: ส่วนได้เสีย
words.example: Quality has a major stake in the project.
